alma.g: con el alma = with all your heart

bajarle.g: to turn it down, ease off

cielo.g: pegar el grito al cielo = to protest loudly

código.g: a code, a secret way of speaking

están.g: para eso están = that is what they are for

fuego.g: prueba de fuego = a trial by fire

madres.g: valer madres = to not matter at all

patas.g: meter las patas = to blunder badly

pecho.g: apretar el pecho = a tight ache in the chest

pensaba.g: no lo pensaba = was not going to

plena.g: en plena mesa = right in the middle of

poco.g: poco a poco = little by little

puesto.g: puesto las pilas = got his act together

ritmo.g: agarrar el ritmo = to find the groove

sacarlo.g: sacar de casillas = to wind him up

suya.g: as if the street were his

trago.g: a swig, a gulp of drink

verso.g: a smooth lie, a rehearsed line

busqués.g: look for, try to work out

prendió.g: prenderse el foco = the lightbulb went on

bandeja.g: servido en bandeja = handed on a plate
